# Copilot Coding Agent Instructions

This file provides repository-specific guidance for GitHub Copilot's coding agent.

## Repository Purpose

This is an agent repository for GitHub Copilot. It contains configurations and resources related to GitHub Copilot agents.

## Coding Guidelines

- Follow standard conventions for any language used in this repository.
- Write clear, self-documenting code with meaningful variable and function names.
- Keep changes minimal and focused — avoid modifying unrelated code.

## Pull Request Guidelines

- Keep PRs small and focused on a single concern.
- Write a clear PR description explaining what was changed and why.
- Ensure all checks pass before marking a PR as ready for review.

## Testing

- Run existing tests before and after making changes.
- Do not remove or skip existing tests.
- Add tests for new functionality when a testing framework is already in use.
